commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
A very wise man. That is, a crafty and subtle man: for the counsel he gave on this occasion shows that his wisdom was but carnal and worldly. (Challoner)
Jonadab seems to be styled Jonathan, chap. xxi. 21. (Calmet)

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: A very wise man: That is, a crafty and subtle man: for the counsel he gave on this occasion shews that his wisdom was but carnal and worldly.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
